description: Two passengers are on the same booking, but one needs to change their return date while the other does not. The agent must split the booking.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original booking with the two passengers.
Execute the command to split the PNR, which creates a new, separate booking for the passenger who needs to make a change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully splits the booking into two separate PNRs.

nodes.task_description: With the passenger now in their own booking, proceed to change their return date, calculating any fees or fare differences.

expected_outcome.value: Agent proceeds with the date change on the newly created booking.
